Empirical analysis across several benchmarks reveals that our proposed uncertainty quantification reliably indicates system failures, which demonstrates the validity of using them as diagnostic metrics to indicate the system failure. Subsequently, we propose a mitigation strategy by formulating an uncertainty-driven policy optimization to penalize self-contradiction, peer conflict, and low-confidence outputs in a dynamic debating environment. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed uncertainty-driven mitigation reliably calibrates the multi-agent system by consistently improving decision accuracy while reducing system disagreement.
tldr: This paper introduces a method to detect and mitigate debate collapse in multi-agent LLM systems by quantifying and penalizing behavioral uncertainty at different levels, leading to improved decision accuracy and reduced disagreement.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种检测和缓解多智能体 LLM 系统中辩论崩溃的方法，通过量化和惩罚不同层级的行为不确定性来提高决策准确性并减少系统分歧。
summary_zh: 多智能体辩论 (MAD) 系统通过迭代商议来提升大型语言模型 (LLM) 的推理能力，但仍然容易受到辩论崩溃的影响，这是一种失效类型，其中最终智能体决策会被错误的推理所损害。现有方法缺乏检测或预防此类失效的原则性机制。为了弥补这一差距，我们首先提出了一种分层指标，用于量化三个层面的行为不确定性：智能体内部（个体推理不确定性）、智能体之间（交互不确定性）和系统层面（输出不确定性）。在多个基准测试上的实证分析表明，我们提出的不确定性量化能够可靠地指示系统失效，这证明了将其用作诊断指标来指示系统失效的有效性。随后，我们提出了一种缓解策略，通过制定一种不确定性驱动的策略优化，以惩罚动态辩论环境中的自我矛盾、同伴冲突和低置信度输出。实验表明，我们提出的不确定性驱动的缓解措施能够通过持续提高决策准确性并减少系统分歧，从而可靠地校准多智能体系统。

title: Learning Nonlinear Systems In-Context: From Synthetic Data to Real-World Motor Control
summary: LLMs have shown strong in-context learning (ICL) abilities, but have not yet been extended to signal processing systems. Inspired by their design, we have proposed for the first time ICL using transformer models applicable to motor feedforward control, a critical task where classical PI and physics-based methods struggle with nonlinearities and complex load conditions. We propose a transformer based model architecture that separates signal representation from system behavior, enabling both few-shot finetuning and one-shot ICL. Pretrained on a large corpus of synthetic linear and nonlinear systems, the model learns to generalize to unseen system dynamics of real-world motors only with a handful of examples. In experiments, our approach generalizes across multiple motor load configurations, transforms untuned examples into accurate feedforward predictions, and outperforms PI controllers and physics-based feedforward baselines. These results demonstrate that ICL can bridge synthetic pretraining and real-world adaptability, opening new directions for data efficient control of physical systems.
tldr: This paper presents a transformer-based in-context learning approach for motor feedforward control, demonstrating strong generalization from synthetic data to real-world motor dynamics and outperforming traditional control methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于Transformer的上下文学习方法，用于电机前馈控制。该方法展示了从合成数据到真实电机动态的强大泛化能力，并优于传统的控制方法。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型(LLMs)展现出强大的上下文学习(ICL)能力，但尚未扩展到信号处理系统。受其设计的启发，我们首次提出了基于Transformer模型的上下文学习方法，适用于电机前馈控制，这是一个关键任务，传统的PI控制和基于物理的方法难以应对非线性以及复杂的负载条件。我们提出了一种基于Transformer的模型架构，将信号表示与系统行为分离，从而实现小样本微调和单样本上下文学习。通过对大量合成的线性和非线性系统进行预训练，该模型仅需少量示例即可泛化到真实电机中未曾见过的系统动力学。在实验中，我们的方法能泛化到多种电机负载配置，将未经调整的示例转换为准确的前馈预测，并且优于PI控制器和基于物理的前馈基线。这些结果表明上下文学习可以弥合合成预训练和真实世界适应性之间的差距，为物理系统的数据高效控制开辟了新的方向。

title: When RL Meets Adaptive Speculative Training: A Unified Training-Serving System
summary:
Speculative decoding can significantly accelerate LLM serving, yet most deployments today disentangle speculator training from serving, treating speculator training as a standalone offline modeling problem. We show that this decoupled formulation introduces substantial deployment and adaptation lag: (1) high time-to-serve, since a speculator must be trained offline for a considerable period before deployment; (2) delayed utility feedback, since the true end-to-end decoding speedup is only known after training and cannot be inferred reliably from acceptance rate alone due to model-architecture and system-level overheads; and (3) domain-drift degradation, as the target model is repurposed to new domains and the speculator becomes stale and less effective.
  To address these issues, we present Aurora, a unified training-serving system that closes the loop by continuously learning a speculator directly from live inference traces. Aurora reframes online speculator learning as an asynchronous reinforcement-learning problem: accepted tokens provide positive feedback, while rejected speculator proposals provide implicit negative feedback that we exploit to improve sample efficiency. Our design integrates an SGLang-based inference server with an asynchronous training server, enabling hot-swapped speculator updates without service interruption. Crucially, Aurora supports day-0 deployment: a speculator can be served immediately and rapidly adapted to live traffic, improving system performance while providing immediate utility feedback. Across experiments, Aurora achieves a 1.5x day-0 speedup on recently released frontier models (e.g., MiniMax M2.1 229B and Qwen3-Coder-Next 80B). Aurora also adapts effectively to distribution shifts in user traffic, delivering an additional 1.25x speedup over a well-trained but static speculator on widely used models (e.g., Qwen3 and Llama3).
tldr: The paper introduces Aurora, a unified training-serving system that uses reinforcement learning to continuously adapt speculative decoding for LLMs, addressing deployment lag and domain drift issues for faster and more efficient serving.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种统一的训练服务系统Aurora，它利用强化学习来持续调整LLM的推测解码，解决了部署滞后和领域漂移问题，从而实现更快、更高效的服务。
summary_zh:
推测解码可以显著加速LLM服务，但目前大多数部署将推测器训练与服务分离，将推测器训练视为独立的离线建模问题。我们表明，这种解耦的公式引入了大量的部署和适应延迟：（1）交付服务时间长，因为推测器必须先进行相当长时间的离线训练才能部署；（2）实用性反馈延迟，因为真正的端到端解码加速只有在训练后才知道，而且由于模型架构和系统级开销，无法仅从接受率可靠地推断出来；（3）领域漂移退化，因为目标模型被重新用于新的领域，而推测器变得陈旧且效率降低。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了Aurora，一个统一的训练-服务系统，它通过直接从实时推理轨迹中持续学习推测器来闭环。 Aurora将在线推测器学习重新定义为一个异步强化学习问题：接受的token提供正向反馈，而拒绝的推测器提议提供隐式负向反馈，我们利用这些反馈来提高采样效率。我们的设计集成了一个基于SGLang的推理服务器和一个异步训练服务器，从而实现热插拔推测器更新而不会中断服务。至关重要的是，Aurora支持day-0部署：推测器可以立即上线并快速适应实时流量，提高系统性能，同时提供即时的实用性反馈。在实验中，Aurora在最近发布的尖端模型（例如，MiniMax M2.1 229B和Qwen3-Coder-Next 80B）上实现了1.5倍的day-0加速。Aurora还能有效地适应用户流量中的分布变化，在广泛使用的模型（例如，Qwen3和Llama3）上，与训练良好但静态的推测器相比，额外实现了1.25倍的加速。

title: Seeing Roads Through Words: A Language-Guided Framework for RGB-T Driving Scene Segmentation
summary: Robust semantic segmentation of road scenes under adverse illumination, lighting, and shadow conditions remain a core challenge for autonomous driving applications. RGB-Thermal fusion is a standard approach, yet existing methods apply static fusion strategies uniformly across all conditions, allowing modality-specific noise to propagate throughout the network. Hence, we propose CLARITY that dynamically adapts its fusion strategy to the detected scene condition. Guided by vision-language model (VLM) priors, the network learns to modulate each modality's contribution based on the illumination state while leveraging object embeddings for segmentation, rather than applying a fixed fusion policy. We further introduce two mechanisms, i.e., one which preserves valid dark-object semantics that prior noise-suppression methods incorrectly discard, and a hierarchical decoder that enforces structural consistency across scales to sharpen boundaries on thin objects. Experiments on the MFNet dataset demonstrate that CLARITY establishes a new state-of-the-art (SOTA), achieving 62.3% mIoU and 77.5% mAcc.
tldr: The paper introduces CLARITY, a novel RGB-T driving scene segmentation framework that uses vision-language model priors to dynamically adjust modality fusion based on scene conditions, achieving state-of-the-art results on the MFNet dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了CLARITY，一种新颖的RGB-T驾驶场景分割框架，它利用视觉-语言模型的先验知识，根据场景条件动态调整模态融合，并在MFNet数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 在不利的照明、光照和阴影条件下，对道路场景进行鲁棒的语义分割仍然是自动驾驶应用的核心挑战。RGB-热成像融合是一种标准方法，但现有方法在所有条件下均采用静态融合策略，导致模态特定的噪声在整个网络中传播。因此，我们提出了CLARITY，它能够根据检测到的场景条件动态调整其融合策略。在视觉-语言模型（VLM）先验的指导下，该网络学习根据照明状态调节每种模态的贡献，同时利用对象嵌入进行分割，而不是应用固定的融合策略。我们进一步引入了两种机制，即一种用于保留有效的暗对象语义，而先前的噪声抑制方法错误地丢弃了这些语义；另一种是一种分层解码器，用于强制执行跨尺度的结构一致性，以锐化细长对象的边界。在MFNet数据集上的实验表明，CLARITY建立了新的最先进水平（SOTA），实现了62.3%的mIoU和77.5%的mAcc。

title: Why Look at It at All?: Vision-Free Multifingered Blind Grasping Using Uniaxial Fingertip Force Sensing
summary: Grasping under limited sensing remains a fundamental challenge for real-world robotic manipulation, as vision and high-resolution tactile sensors often introduce cost, fragility, and integration complexity. This work demonstrates that reliable multifingered grasping can be achieved under extremely minimal sensing by relying solely on uniaxial fingertip force feedback and joint proprioception, without vision or multi-axis/tactile sensing. To enable such blind grasping, we employ an efficient teacher-student training pipeline in which a reinforcement-learned teacher exploits privileged simulation-only observations to generate demonstrations for distilling a transformer-based student policy operating under partial observation. The student policy is trained to act using only sensing modalities available at real-world deployment. We validate the proposed approach on real hardware across 18 objects, including both in-distribution and out-of-distribution cases, achieving a 98.3~$\%$ overall grasp success rate. These results demonstrate strong robustness and generalization beyond the simulation training distribution, while significantly reducing sensing requirements for real-world grasping systems.
tldr: This paper presents a vision-free robotic grasping system that achieves high success rates using only uniaxial fingertip force sensing and joint proprioception, trained via a teacher-student reinforcement learning pipeline.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种无需视觉的机器人抓取系统，该系统仅使用单轴指尖力感应和关节本体感受就能实现高成功率，并通过师生强化学习管道进行训练。
summary_zh: 在有限感知条件下进行抓取仍然是现实世界机器人操作的一个根本挑战，因为视觉和高分辨率触觉传感器通常会带来成本、脆弱性和集成复杂性。 本文展示了，仅依赖单轴指尖力反馈和关节本体感受，而无需视觉或多轴/触觉传感，即可实现可靠的多指抓取。 为了实现这种盲抓取，我们采用了一种高效的师生训练管道，其中强化学习的教师利用特权仅仿真观测来生成示范，以提炼出一个在部分观测下运行的基于Transformer的学生策略。 学生策略被训练成仅使用真实世界部署中可用的感知模式采取行动。 我们在包含18个物体的真实硬件上验证了所提出的方法，包括分布内和分布外的情况，实现了98.3%的整体抓取成功率。 这些结果表明，其具有强大的鲁棒性和对超出仿真训练分布的泛化能力，同时显著降低了真实世界抓取系统的感知需求。

title: Cerebellar-Inspired Residual Control for Fault Recovery: From Inference-Time Adaptation to Structural Consolidation
summary: Robotic policies deployed in real-world environments often encounter post-training faults, where retraining, exploration, or system identification are impractical. We introduce an inference-time, cerebellar-inspired residual control framework that augments a frozen reinforcement learning policy with online corrective actions, enabling fault recovery without modifying base policy parameters. The framework instantiates core cerebellar principles, including high-dimensional pattern separation via fixed feature expansion, parallel microzone-style residual pathways, and local error-driven plasticity with excitatory and inhibitory eligibility traces operating at distinct time scales. These mechanisms enable fast, localized correction under post-training disturbances while avoiding destabilizing global policy updates. A conservative, performance-driven meta-adaptation regulates residual authority and plasticity, preserving nominal behavior and suppressing unnecessary intervention. Experiments on MuJoCo benchmarks under actuator, dynamic, and environmental perturbations show improvements of up to $+66\%$ on \texttt{HalfCheetah-v5} and $+53\%$ on \texttt{Humanoid-v5} under moderate faults, with graceful degradation under severe shifts and complementary robustness from consolidating persistent residual corrections into policy parameters.
tldr: This paper introduces a cerebellar-inspired residual control framework for fault recovery in robotic policies, enabling online corrective actions without retraining and demonstrating performance improvements on MuJoCo benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种受小脑启发的残差控制框架，用于机器人策略中的故障恢复，无需重新训练即可实现在线校正，并在MuJoCo基准测试中展示了性能提升。
summary_zh: 在真实世界环境中部署的机器人策略常常会遇到训练后的故障，此时重新训练、探索或系统辨识并不实际。我们提出一种推理时，受小脑启发的残差控制框架，通过在线修正动作增强已冻结的强化学习策略，从而在不修改基础策略参数的情况下实现故障恢复。该框架体现了核心小脑原则，包括通过固定特征扩展实现高维模式分离、并行的微区式残差通路以及基于局部误差驱动的可塑性，后者利用在不同时间尺度上运行的兴奋性和抑制性资格迹。这些机制能够在训练后扰动下进行快速、局部的校正，同时避免破坏性的全局策略更新。一种保守的、性能驱动的元适应调节残差权限和可塑性，从而保持标称行为并抑制不必要的干预。在MuJoCo基准测试中，在执行器、动态和环境扰动下进行的实验表明，在中等程度的故障下，\texttt{HalfCheetah-v5} 的性能提升高达 $+66\%$，\texttt{Humanoid-v5} 的性能提升高达 $+53\%$，在严重偏移下能平滑降级，并通过将持久残差校正整合到策略参数中获得互补的鲁棒性。

title: Continuum Robot Localization using Distributed Time-of-Flight Sensors
summary: Localization and mapping of an environment are crucial tasks for any robot operating in unstructured environments. Time-of-flight (ToF) sensors (e.g.,~lidar) have proven useful in mobile robotics, where high-resolution sensors can be used for simultaneous localization and mapping. In soft and continuum robotics, however, these high-resolution sensors are too large for practical use. This, combined with the deformable nature of such robots, has resulted in continuum robot (CR) localization and mapping in unstructured environments being a largely untouched area. In this work, we present a localization technique for CRs that relies on small, low-resolution ToF sensors distributed along the length of the robot. By fusing measurement information with a robot shape prior, we show that accurate localization is possible despite each sensor experiencing frequent degenerate scenarios. We achieve an average localization error of 2.5cm in position and 7.2° in rotation across all experimental conditions with a 53cm long robot. We demonstrate that the results are repeated across multiple environments, in both simulation and real-world experiments, and study robustness in the estimation to deviations in the prior map.
tldr: This paper presents a novel localization technique for continuum robots using distributed, low-resolution Time-of-Flight sensors, achieving accurate localization by fusing sensor data with a robot shape prior and demonstrating robustness across various environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用分布式低分辨率飞行时间传感器进行连续体机器人定位的新技术。 通过将传感器数据与机器人形状先验融合，实现了精确定位，并在各种环境中展示了鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 环境的定位和地图构建是任何在非结构化环境中运行的机器人所必需的关键任务。飞行时间（ToF）传感器（例如，激光雷达）已被证明在移动机器人技术中非常有用，高分辨率传感器可用于同步定位与地图构建。然而，在软体和连续体机器人领域，这些高分辨率传感器对于实际应用而言体积过大。这一因素，加上此类机器人的可变形特性，导致连续体机器人（CR）在非结构化环境中的定位和地图构建在很大程度上仍是未被触及的领域。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种CR定位技术，该技术依赖于沿着机器人长度分布的小型、低分辨率ToF传感器。通过将测量信息与机器人形状先验信息融合，我们证明了即使每个传感器都经常遇到退化情况，也能实现精确的定位。在所有实验条件下，对于一个长度为53厘米的机器人，我们获得了平均2.5厘米的位置定位误差和7.2°的旋转定位误差。我们证明了该结果在多个环境中都能重复实现，包括仿真和真实环境实验，并研究了估计对先验地图偏差的鲁棒性。

title: Strategizing at Speed: A Learned Model Predictive Game for Multi-Agent Drone Racing
summary: Autonomous drone racing pushes the boundaries of high-speed motion planning and multi-agent strategic decision-making. Success in this domain requires drones not only to navigate at their limits but also to anticipate and counteract competitors' actions. In this paper, we study a fundamental question that arises in this domain: how deeply should an agent strategize before taking an action? To this end, we compare two planning paradigms: the Model Predictive Game (MPG), which finds interaction-aware strategies at the expense of longer computation times, and contouring Model Predictive Control (MPC), which computes strategies rapidly but does not reason about interactions. We perform extensive experiments to study this trade-off, revealing that MPG outperforms MPC at moderate velocities but loses its advantage at higher speeds due to latency. To address this shortcoming, we propose a Learned Model Predictive Game (LMPG) approach that amortizes model predictive gameplay to reduce latency. In both simulation and hardware experiments, we benchmark our approach against MPG and MPC in head-to-head races, finding that LMPG outperforms both baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces a Learned Model Predictive Game (LMPG) for multi-agent drone racing, which addresses the trade-off between strategic planning depth and computation time, outperforming both Model Predictive Game (MPG) and Model Predictive Control (MPC) baselines in simulations and hardware experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于多智能体无人机竞赛的学习模型预测博弈（LMPG）方法，该方法解决了战略规划深度和计算时间之间的权衡问题，并在模拟和硬件实验中优于模型预测博弈（MPG）和模型预测控制（MPC）基线。
summary_zh: 自主无人机竞速推动了高速运动规划和多智能体策略决策的边界。在该领域取得成功不仅需要无人机以极限状态导航，还需要预测并反制竞争对手的行动。本文研究了该领域中出现的一个基本问题：智能体在采取行动前应进行多深层次的策略思考？为此，我们比较两种规划范式：模型预测博弈(MPG)，它以更长的计算时间为代价寻找具有交互感知的策略；以及等值线模型预测控制(MPC)，它能快速计算策略，但不能推断交互。我们进行了广泛的实验来研究这种权衡取舍，结果表明MPG在中等速度下优于MPC，但在更高速度下由于延迟而失去优势。为了解决这个缺点，我们提出了一种学习型模型预测博弈(LMPG)方法，它通过摊销模型预测博弈过程来减少延迟。在仿真和硬件实验中，我们通过头对头比赛将我们的方法与MPG和MPC进行基准比较，发现LMPG优于两个基线方法。

title: M2A: Multimodal Memory Agent with Dual-Layer Hybrid Memory for Long-Term Personalized Interactions
summary: This work addresses the challenge of personalized question answering in long-term human-machine interactions: when conversational history spans weeks or months and exceeds the context window, existing personalization mechanisms struggle to continuously absorb and leverage users' incremental concepts, aliases, and preferences. Current personalized multimodal models are predominantly static-concepts are fixed at initialization and cannot evolve during interactions. We propose M2A, an agentic dual-layer hybrid memory system that maintains personalized multimodal information through online updates. The system employs two collaborative agents: ChatAgent manages user interactions and autonomously decides when to query or update memory, while MemoryManager breaks down memory requests from ChatAgent into detailed operations on the dual-layer memory bank, which couples a RawMessageStore (immutable conversation log) with a SemanticMemoryStore (high-level observations), providing memories at different granularities. In addition, we develop a reusable data synthesis pipeline that injects concept-grounded sessions from Yo'LLaVA and MC-LLaVA into LoCoMo long conversations while preserving temporal coherence. Experiments show that M2A significantly outperforms baselines, demonstrating that transforming personalization from one-shot configuration to a co-evolving memory mechanism provides a viable path for high-quality individualized responses in long-term multimodal interactions. The code is available at https://github.com/Little-Fridge/M2A.
tldr: The paper introduces M2A, a dual-layer hybrid memory system that enhances personalized question answering in long-term, multimodal human-machine interactions by continuously updating and leveraging user preferences and concepts. Experiments show M2A outperforms baselines in generating individualized responses.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了M2A，一个双层混合记忆系统，通过持续更新和利用用户偏好和概念来增强长期、多模态人机交互中的个性化问答。实验表明，M2A在生成个性化响应方面优于基线。
summary_zh: 本研究旨在解决长期人机交互中的个性化问答难题：当对话历史跨越数周或数月并超出上下文窗口时，现有的个性化机制难以持续吸收和利用用户增量式的概念、别名和偏好。当前的个性化多模态模型主要为静态模型——概念在初始化时被固定，并且在交互过程中无法演变。我们提出了M2A，一种代理式双层混合记忆系统，通过在线更新来维护个性化的多模态信息。该系统采用两个协同代理：ChatAgent管理用户交互，并自主决定何时查询或更新记忆；MemoryManager将来自ChatAgent的记忆请求分解为对双层记忆库的详细操作，该记忆库耦合了RawMessageStore（不可变的对话日志）和SemanticMemoryStore（高阶观察），从而提供不同粒度的记忆。此外，我们开发了一个可重用的数据合成流程，将来自Yo'LLaVA和MC-LLaVA的概念性会话注入到LoCoMo长对话中，同时保持时间相干性。实验表明，M2A显著优于基线模型，证明将个性化从一次性配置转变为共同演化的记忆机制为长期多模态交互中高质量的个性化响应提供了一条可行的途径。代码可在https://github.com/Little-Fridge/M2A获得。

title: When Is Enough Not Enough? Illusory Completion in Search Agents
summary: Recent search agents leverage multi-turn reasoning and search tools to achieve strong performance on multi-hop and long-horizon benchmarks. Yet it remains unclear whether they reliably reason across all requirements by tracking, verifying, and maintaining multiple conditions in these questions. We study this capability under multi-constraint problems, where valid answers must satisfy several constraints simultaneously. We find that illusory completion frequently occurs, wherein agents believe tasks are complete despite unresolved or violated constraints, leading to underverified answers. To diagnose this behavior, we introduce the Epistemic Ledger, an evaluation framework that tracks evidential support and agents' beliefs for each constraint throughout multi-turn reasoning. Our analysis reveals four recurring failure patterns: bare assertions, overlooked refutations, stagnation, and premature exit. Motivated by these findings, we examine whether explicit constraint-state tracking during execution mitigates these failures via LiveLedger, an inference-time tracker. This simple intervention consistently improves performance, substantially reducing underverified answers (by up to 26.5%) and improving overall accuracy (by up to 11.6%) on multi-constraint problems.
tldr: The paper identifies 'illusory completion' in search agents, where agents incorrectly believe tasks are complete despite unresolved constraints, and introduces a framework (Epistemic Ledger) and method (LiveLedger) for detecting and mitigating this issue, improving performance on multi-constraint problems.
tldr_zh: 该论文发现搜索代理中存在“虚幻完成”现象，即代理错误地认为任务已经完成，尽管存在未解决的约束。论文介绍了一个用于检测和缓解此问题的框架（Epistemic Ledger）和方法（LiveLedger），从而提高了多约束问题的性能。
summary_zh: 最近的搜索代理利用多轮推理和搜索工具，在多跳和长时程基准测试中取得了优异的性能。然而，它们是否能够可靠地推理所有需求，通过跟踪、验证和维护这些问题中的多个约束条件，仍然不清楚。我们研究了其在多约束问题下的这种能力，其中有效的答案必须同时满足多个约束。我们发现经常出现虚幻完成现象，即代理相信任务已经完成，尽管存在未解决或违反的约束，导致答案未经充分验证。为了诊断这种行为，我们引入了认知账本，这是一个评估框架，用于跟踪证据支持以及代理在多轮推理过程中对每个约束的信念。我们的分析揭示了四个反复出现的失败模式：空洞断言、被忽视的反驳、停滞和过早退出。受这些发现的启发，我们研究了在执行期间显式地跟踪约束状态是否能够通过LiveLedger（一种推理时跟踪器）来缓解这些失败。这种简单的干预措施持续地提高了性能，显著地减少了未经充分验证的答案（最多降低26.5%），并提高了多约束问题的整体准确性（最多提高11.6%）。

title: Proximal Action Replacement for Behavior Cloning Actor-Critic in Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) optimizes policies from a previously collected static dataset and is an important branch of RL. A popular and promising approach is to regularize actor-critic methods with behavior cloning (BC), which yields realistic policies and mitigates bias from out-of-distribution actions, but can impose an often-overlooked performance ceiling: when dataset actions are suboptimal, indiscriminate imitation structurally prevents the actor from fully exploiting high-value regions suggested by the critic, especially in later training when imitation is already dominant. We formally analyzed this limitation by investigating convergence properties of BC-regularized actor-critic optimization and verified it on a controlled continuous bandit task. To break this ceiling, we propose proximal action replacement (PAR), a plug-and-play training sample replacer that progressively replaces low-value actions with high-value actions generated by a stable actor, broadening the action exploration space while reducing the impact of low-value data. PAR is compatible with multiple BC regularization paradigms. Extensive experiments across offline RL benchmarks show that PAR consistently improves performance and approaches state-of-the-art when combined with the basic TD3+BC.
tldr: The paper identifies a performance ceiling in behavior cloning regularized actor-critic methods for offline RL due to indiscriminate imitation of suboptimal actions and introduces Proximal Action Replacement (PAR) to address this limitation by progressively replacing low-value actions with high-value actions.
tldr_zh: 该论文指出，在离线强化学习中，行为克隆正则化的 Actor-Critic 方法由于对次优行为的不加选择的模仿而存在性能上限； 并提出了一种近端行为替换 (PAR) 方法，通过逐渐用高价值行为替换低价值行为来解决此局限。
summary_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）从先前收集的静态数据集中优化策略，是强化学习的一个重要分支。一种流行且有前景的方法是使用行为克隆（BC）来正则化Actor-Critic方法，这可以产生现实的策略并减轻来自分布外动作的偏差，但会造成一个经常被忽视的性能上限：当数据集动作次优时，不加区分的模仿会在结构上阻止Actor充分利用Critic指示的高价值区域，尤其是在训练后期模仿已经占据主导地位时。我们通过研究BC正则化Actor-Critic优化的收敛特性，对该局限性进行了正式分析，并在受控的连续赌博机任务中验证了它。为了打破这一上限，我们提出了近端动作替代（PAR），这是一种即插即用的训练样本替换器，它逐步将低价值动作替换为由稳定Actor生成的高价值动作，从而扩大了动作探索空间，同时减少了低价值数据的影响。PAR与多种BC正则化范式兼容。在离线RL基准上的大量实验表明，PAR能够持续提高性能，并且在与基本的TD3+BC结合使用时，能够达到最先进的水平。

title: Ex-Omni: Enabling 3D Facial Animation Generation for Omni-modal Large Language Models
summary: Omni-modal large language models (OLLMs) aim to unify multimodal understanding and generation, yet incorporating speech with 3D facial animation remains largely unexplored despite its importance for natural interaction. A key challenge arises from the representation mismatch between discrete, token-level semantic reasoning in LLMs and the dense, fine-grained temporal dynamics required for 3D facial motion, which makes direct modeling difficult to optimize under limited data. We propose Expressive Omni (Ex-Omni), an open-source omni-modal framework that augments OLLMs with speech-accompanied 3D facial animation. Ex-Omni reduces learning difficulty by decoupling semantic reasoning from temporal generation, leveraging speech units as temporal scaffolding and a unified token-as-query gated fusion (TQGF) mechanism for controlled semantic injection. We further introduce InstructEx, a dataset aims to facilitate augment OLLMs with speech-accompanied 3D facial animation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Ex-Omni performs competitively against existing open-source OLLMs while enabling stable aligned speech and facial animation generation.
tldr: The paper introduces Ex-Omni, an open-source framework that integrates speech with 3D facial animation into omni-modal language models, addressing the challenge of aligning discrete semantic reasoning with continuous temporal facial dynamics by using speech units as scaffolding.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了Ex-Omni，一个开源框架，将语音与3D面部动画集成到全模态语言模型中，通过使用语音单元作为支架，解决了将离散语义推理与连续时间面部动态对齐的难题。
summary_zh: 全模态大型语言模型（OLLM）旨在统一多模态理解与生成，然而，尽管语音与3D面部动画的结合对于自然交互至关重要，但该领域的研究仍有待探索。一个关键挑战源于LLM中离散的、token级别的语义推理，与3D面部运动所需的密集、细粒度时间动态之间的表示不匹配，这使得在有限数据下直接建模难以优化。我们提出了Expressive Omni (Ex-Omni)，一个开源的全模态框架，它利用语音伴随的3D面部动画来增强OLLM。Ex-Omni通过解耦语义推理与时间生成来降低学习难度，利用语音单元作为时间支架，并采用统一的token即查询门控融合（TQGF）机制进行可控的语义注入。我们进一步推出了InstructEx数据集，旨在促进OLLM通过语音伴随的3D面部动画进行增强。大量实验表明，Ex-Omni在与现有开源OLLM竞争时表现出色，同时能够实现稳定对齐的语音和面部动画生成。

title: CineScene: Implicit 3D as Effective Scene Representation for Cinematic Video Generation
summary: Cinematic video production requires control over scene-subject composition and camera movement, but live-action shooting remains costly due to the need for constructing physical sets. To address this, we introduce the task of cinematic video generation with decoupled scene context: given multiple images of a static environment, the goal is to synthesize high-quality videos featuring dynamic subject while preserving the underlying scene consistency and following a user-specified camera trajectory. We present CineScene, a framework that leverages implicit 3D-aware scene representation for cinematic video generation. Our key innovation is a novel context conditioning mechanism that injects 3D-aware features in an implicit way: By encoding scene images into visual representations through VGGT, CineScene injects spatial priors into a pretrained text-to-video generation model by additional context concatenation, enabling camera-controlled video synthesis with consistent scenes and dynamic subjects. To further enhance the model's robustness, we introduce a simple yet effective random-shuffling strategy for the input scene images during training. To address the lack of training data, we construct a scene-decoupled dataset with Unreal Engine 5, containing paired videos of scenes with and without dynamic subjects, panoramic images representing the underlying static scene, along with their camera trajectories. Experiments show that CineScene achieves state-of-the-art performance in scene-consistent cinematic video generation, handling large camera movements and demonstrating generalization across diverse environments.
tldr: CineScene introduces a framework for cinematic video generation with decoupled scene context using implicit 3D-aware scene representation and a novel context conditioning mechanism, allowing for camera-controlled video synthesis with consistent scenes and dynamic subjects.
tldr_zh: CineScene 提出了一个电影视频生成框架，通过隐式 3D 感知场景表示和一种新的上下文条件作用机制实现解耦场景上下文，从而可以使用相机控制合成具有一致场景和动态主体的视频。
summary_zh: 电影视频制作需要控制场景-主体构图和相机运动，但实景拍摄由于需要搭建物理场景仍然成本高昂。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了具有解耦场景上下文的电影视频生成任务：给定静态环境的多张图像，目标是合成高质量的视频，其中包含动态主体，同时保持底层场景的一致性并遵循用户指定的相机轨迹。我们提出了 CineScene，一个利用隐式3D感知场景表示进行电影视频生成的框架。我们的关键创新是一种新颖的上下文条件机制，以一种隐式的方式注入3D感知特征：通过使用VGGT将场景图像编码为视觉表示，CineScene通过额外的上下文连接将空间先验注入到预训练的文本到视频生成模型中，从而实现具有一致场景和动态主体的相机控制视频合成。为了进一步增强模型的鲁棒性，我们引入了一种简单而有效的随机洗牌策略，用于训练期间的输入场景图像。为了解决训练数据不足的问题，我们使用 Unreal Engine 5 构建了一个场景解耦数据集，其中包含场景的有无动态主体的配对视频、代表底层静态场景的全景图像以及它们的相机轨迹。实验表明，CineScene 在场景一致的电影视频生成方面实现了最先进的性能，能够处理大型相机运动并展示了跨不同环境的泛化能力。

title: Pareto-guided Pipeline for Distilling Featherweight AI Agents in Mobile MOBA Games
summary: Recent advances in game AI have demonstrated the feasibility of training agents that surpass top-tier human professionals in complex environments such as Honor of Kings (HoK), a leading mobile multiplayer online battle arena (MOBA) game. However, deploying such powerful agents on mobile devices remains a major challenge. On one hand, the intricate multi-modal state representation and hierarchical action space of HoK demand large, sophisticated policy networks that are inherently difficult to compress into lightweight forms. On the other hand, production deployment requires high-frequency inference under strict energy and latency constraints on mobile platform. To the best of our knowledge, bridging large-scale game AI and practical on-device deployment has not been systematically studied. In this work, we propose a Pareto optimality guided pipeline and design a high-efficiency student architecture search space tailored for mobile execution, enabling systematic exploration of the trade-off between performance and efficiency. Experimental results demonstrate that the distilled model achieves remarkable efficiency, including an $12.4\times$ faster inference speed (under 0.5ms per frame) and a $15.6\times$ improvement in energy efficiency (under 0.5mAh per game), while retaining a 40.32% win rate against the original teacher model.
tldr: This paper introduces a Pareto-guided pipeline for distilling large game AI models into lightweight, efficient agents for mobile MOBA games, achieving significant speed and energy efficiency gains while retaining a considerable win rate against the original model.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种Pareto引导的pipeline，用于将大型游戏AI模型提炼成轻量级、高效的移动MOBA游戏智能体，在保持较高胜率的同时，实现了显著的速度和能源效率提升。
summary_zh: 游戏AI的最新进展表明，在复杂环境中训练出超越顶尖人类职业玩家水平的AI智能体是可行的，例如领先的移动多人在线战术竞技游戏《王者荣耀》。然而，在移动设备上部署如此强大的智能体仍然是一个主要的挑战。一方面，《王者荣耀》复杂的多模态状态表示和分层的动作空间需要大型、精密的策略网络，这些网络本质上难以压缩成轻量级的形式。另一方面，生产环境部署要求在严格的移动平台能量和延迟约束下进行高频推理。据我们所知，将大规模游戏AI与实际的设备端部署相结合尚未进行系统性研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种帕累托最优引导的流程，并设计了一种针对移动执行定制的高效学生架构搜索空间，从而能够系统地探索性能和效率之间的权衡。实验结果表明，经过蒸馏的模型实现了卓越的效率，包括12.4倍的推理速度提升（每帧低于0.5毫秒）和15.6倍的能效提升（每局游戏低于0.5毫安时），同时保持了针对原始教师模型40.32%的胜率。

title: CoMI-IRL: Contrastive Multi-Intention Inverse Reinforcement Learning
summary: Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) seeks to infer reward functions from expert demonstrations. When demonstrations originate from multiple experts with different intentions, the problem is known as Multi-Intention IRL (MI-IRL). Recent deep generative MI-IRL approaches couple behavior clustering and reward learning, but typically require prior knowledge of the number of true behavioral modes $K^*$. This reliance on expert knowledge limits their adaptability to new behaviors, and only enables analysis related to the learned rewards, and not across the behavior modes used to train them. We propose Contrastive Multi-Intention IRL (CoMI-IRL), a transformer-based unsupervised framework that decouples behavior representation and clustering from downstream reward learning. Our experiments show that CoMI-IRL outperforms existing approaches without a priori knowledge of $K^*$ or labels, while allowing for visual interpretation of behavior relationships and adaptation to unseen behavior without full retraining.
tldr: CoMI-IRL is a transformer-based unsupervised inverse reinforcement learning framework that decouples behavior representation and clustering from reward learning, outperforming existing multi-intention IRL methods without prior knowledge of the number of behavioral modes.
tldr_zh: CoMI-IRL 是一种基于 Transformer 的无监督逆强化学习框架，它将行为表征和聚类与奖励学习分离，在不需要先验行为模式数量知识的情况下，性能优于现有的多意图 IRL 方法。
summary_zh: 逆强化学习（IRL）旨在从专家演示中推断奖励函数。当演示源自具有不同意图的多个专家时，该问题被称为多意图IRL（MI-IRL）。最近的深度生成MI-IRL方法将行为聚类和奖励学习结合起来，但通常需要预先知道真实行为模式的数量$K^*$。这种对专家知识的依赖限制了它们对新行为的适应性，并且仅能进行与学习到的奖励相关的分析，而不能跨用于训练的行为模式进行分析。我们提出对比多意图IRL（CoMI-IRL），这是一个基于Transformer的无监督框架，它将行为表示和聚类与下游奖励学习解耦。我们的实验表明，CoMI-IRL在没有$K^*$的先验知识或标签的情况下，优于现有方法，同时允许对行为关系进行可视化解释，并适应未见过的行为而无需完全重新训练。

title: Nonparametric Bayesian Optimization for General Rewards
summary: This work focuses on Bayesian optimization (BO) under reward model uncertainty. We propose the first BO algorithm that achieves no-regret guarantee in a general reward setting, requiring only Lipschitz continuity of the objective function and accommodating a broad class of measurement noise. The core of our approach is a novel surrogate model, termed as infinite Gaussian process ($\infty$-GP). It is a Bayesian nonparametric model that places a prior on the space of reward distributions, enabling it to represent a substantially broader class of reward models than classical Gaussian process (GP). The $\infty$-GP is used in combination with Thompson Sampling (TS) to enable effective exploration and exploitation. Correspondingly, we develop a new TS regret analysis framework for general rewards, which relates the regret to the total variation distance between the surrogate model and the true reward distribution. Furthermore, with a truncated Gibbs sampling procedure, our method is computationally scalable, incurring minimal additional memory and computational complexities compared to classical GP. Empirical results demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, particularly in settings with non-stationary, heavy-tailed, or other ill-conditioned rewards.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel Bayesian optimization (BO) algorithm called infinite Gaussian process ($\infty$-GP) for general reward settings, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance with theoretical no-regret guarantees and computational scalability.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的贝叶斯优化（BO）算法，称为无限高斯过程（$\infty$-GP），用于通用奖励设置，在理论上提供了无悔保证和计算可扩展性，并展示了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 本研究关注奖励模型不确定性下的贝叶斯优化(BO)。我们提出了首个在通用奖励设置下实现无悔保证的BO算法，该算法仅需目标函数的Lipschitz连续性，并可容纳广泛类别的测量噪声。该方法的核心是一种新型代理模型，被称为无限高斯过程($\infty$-GP)。它是一种贝叶斯非参数模型，对奖励分布空间施加先验，使其能够表示比经典高斯过程(GP)更广泛的奖励模型类别。$\infty$-GP与Thompson采样(TS)相结合，以实现有效的探索和利用。相应地，我们为通用奖励开发了一种新的TS后悔分析框架，该框架将后悔与代理模型和真实奖励分布之间的总变差距离相关联。此外，通过截断的Gibbs采样过程，我们的方法在计算上具有可扩展性，与经典GP相比，产生的额外内存和计算复杂度极小。经验结果表明其具有最先进的性能，尤其是在具有非平稳、重尾或其他病态奖励的设置中。

title: Risk-Sensitive Exponential Actor Critic
summary: Model-free deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms have achieved tremendous success on a range of challenging tasks. However, safety concerns remain when these methods are deployed on real-world applications, necessitating risk-aware agents. A common utility for learning such risk-aware agents is the entropic risk measure, but current policy gradient methods optimizing this measure must perform high-variance and numerically unstable updates. As a result, existing risk-sensitive model-free approaches are limited to simple tasks and tabular settings. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive theoretical justification for policy gradient methods on the entropic risk measure, including on- and off-policy gradient theorems for the stochastic and deterministic policy settings. Motivated by theory, we propose risk-sensitive exponential actor-critic (rsEAC), an off-policy model-free approach that incorporates novel procedures to avoid the explicit representation of exponential value functions and their gradients, and optimizes its policy w.r.t the entropic risk measure. We show that rsEAC produces more numerically stable updates compared to existing approaches and reliably learns risk-sensitive policies in challenging risky variants of continuous tasks in MuJoCo.
tldr: The paper introduces risk-sensitive exponential actor-critic (rsEAC), a new model-free RL algorithm for learning risk-aware policies in challenging continuous control tasks, with theoretical justification and improved numerical stability compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种风险敏感的指数型Actor-Critic算法(rsEAC)，这是一种新的无模型强化学习算法，用于在具有挑战性的连续控制任务中学习风险感知策略，与现有方法相比，该算法具有理论依据和改进的数值稳定性。
summary_zh: 无模型的深度强化学习（RL）算法已在一系列具有挑战性的任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，当这些方法部署到现实世界的应用中时，安全问题依然存在，因此需要具有风险意识的智能体。熵风险度量是学习此类风险意识智能体的一种常用效用函数，但当前优化此度量的策略梯度方法必须执行高方差和数值不稳定的更新。因此，现有的风险敏感型无模型方法仅限于简单的任务和表格设置。在本文中，我们为熵风险度量上的策略梯度方法提供了全面的理论依据，包括针对随机和确定性策略设置的同策略和异策略梯度定理。受理论的启发，我们提出风险敏感指数 Actor-Critic (rsEAC)，一种异策略无模型方法，该方法结合了新颖的过程，以避免指数价值函数及其梯度的显式表示，并针对熵风险度量优化其策略。我们表明，与现有方法相比，rsEAC 产生更数值稳定的更新，并且能够在 MuJoCo 中具有挑战性的连续任务风险变体中可靠地学习风险敏感型策略。

title: Continuous-time reinforcement learning: ellipticity enables model-free value function approximation
summary:
We study off-policy reinforcement learning for controlling continuous-time Markov diffusion processes with discrete-time observations and actions. We consider model-free algorithms with function approximation that learn value and advantage functions directly from data, without unrealistic structural assumptions on the dynamics.
  Leveraging the ellipticity of the diffusions, we establish a new class of Hilbert-space positive definiteness and boundedness properties for the Bellman operators. Based on these properties, we propose the Sobolev-prox fitted $q$-learning algorithm, which learns value and advantage functions by iteratively solving least-squares regression problems. We derive oracle inequalities for the estimation error, governed by (i) the best approximation error of the function classes, (ii) their localized complexity, (iii) exponentially decaying optimization error, and (iv) numerical discretization error. These results identify ellipticity as a key structural property that renders reinforcement learning with function approximation for Markov diffusions no harder than supervised learning.
tldr: This paper introduces a model-free, off-policy reinforcement learning algorithm (Sobolev-prox fitted q-learning) for continuous-time Markov diffusion processes, leveraging ellipticity properties to achieve performance comparable to supervised learning with function approximation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于连续时间马尔可夫扩散过程的无模型、离策略强化学习算法（Sobolev-prox fitted q-learning），利用椭圆性质实现与函数逼近下的监督学习相当的性能。
summary_zh:
我们研究针对具有离散时间观测和动作的连续时间马尔可夫扩散过程的离策略强化学习。我们考虑使用函数逼近的无模型算法，它直接从数据中学习价值函数和优势函数，而无需对动力学做出不切实际的结构性假设。

利用扩散过程的椭圆性，我们为贝尔曼算子建立了一类新的希尔伯特空间正定性和有界性属性。基于这些属性，我们提出了索博列夫邻近拟合的q学习算法，该算法通过迭代求解最小二乘回归问题来学习价值函数和优势函数。我们推导了估计误差的预言不等式，该不等式受下列因素控制：（i）函数类的最佳逼近误差，（ii）它们的局部复杂度，（iii）指数衰减的优化误差，以及（iv）数值离散化误差。这些结果表明，椭圆性是一个关键的结构性属性，它使得对马尔可夫扩散过程的函数逼近强化学习不比监督学习更难。

title: VividFace: Real-Time and Realistic Facial Expression Shadowing for Humanoid Robots
summary: Humanoid facial expression shadowing enables robots to realistically imitate human facial expressions in real time, which is critical for lifelike, facially expressive humanoid robots and affective human-robot interaction. Existing progress in humanoid facial expression imitation remains limited, often failing to achieve either real-time performance or realistic expressiveness due to offline video-based inference designs and insufficient ability to capture and transfer subtle expression details. To address these limitations, we present VividFace, a real-time and realistic facial expression shadowing system for humanoid robots. An optimized imitation framework X2CNet++ enhances expressiveness by fine-tuning the human-to-humanoid facial motion transfer module and introducing a feature-adaptation training strategy for better alignment across different image sources. Real-time shadowing is further enabled by a video-stream-compatible inference pipeline and a streamlined workflow based on asynchronous I/O for efficient communication across devices. VividFace produces vivid humanoid faces by mimicking human facial expressions within 0.05 seconds, while generalizing across diverse facial configurations. Extensive real-world demonstrations validate its practical utility. Videos are available at: https://lipzh5.github.io/VividFace/.
tldr: VividFace is a real-time system for humanoid robots that realistically shadows human facial expressions using an optimized imitation framework and asynchronous I/O for efficient communication.
tldr_zh: VividFace是一个用于人形机器人的实时系统，它通过优化模仿框架和异步I/O，高效地模仿人类面部表情，实现逼真的人脸表情跟随。
summary_zh: 人形机器人面部表情复刻技术使机器人能够实时逼真地模仿人类的面部表情，这对栩栩如生、面部表情丰富的人形机器人和情感化人机交互至关重要。目前，人形机器人面部表情模仿方面的进展仍然有限，由于离线的基于视频的推理设计以及捕捉和传递细微表情细节的能力不足，常常无法达到实时性能或逼真的表现力。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了 VividFace，一个用于人形机器人的实时且逼真的面部表情复刻系统。 优化的模仿框架 X2CNet++ 通过微调人到人形的面部运动传递模块，并引入特征自适应训练策略，以更好地对齐不同图像源，从而增强了表现力。 通过视频流兼容的推理管道和基于异步 I/O 的简化工作流程，实现设备间高效通信，进一步实现了实时复刻。 VividFace 通过在 0.05 秒内模仿人类面部表情来产生栩栩如生的人形机器人面部，同时还在不同的面部配置之间进行泛化。 大量的真实世界演示验证了其应用价值。 相关视频见：https://lipzh5.github.io/VividFace/。

title: Computing the Reachability Value of Posterior-Deterministic POMDPs
summary:
Partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) are a fundamental model for sequential decision-making under uncertainty. However, many verification and synthesis problems for POMDPs are undecidable or intractable. Most prominently, the seminal result of Madani et al. (2003) states that there is no algorithm that, given a POMDP and a set of target states, can compute the maximal probability of reaching the target states, or even approximate it up to a non-trivial constant. This is in stark contrast to fully observable Markov decision processes (MDPs), where the reachability value can be computed in polynomial time.
  In this work, we introduce posterior-deterministic POMDPs, a novel class of POMDPs. Our main technical contribution is to show that for posterior-deterministic POMDPs, the maximal probability of reaching a given set of states can be approximated up to arbitrary precision.
  A POMDP is posterior-deterministic if the next state can be uniquely determined by the current state, the action taken, and the observation received. While the actual state is generally uncertain in POMDPs, the posterior-deterministic property tells us that once the true state is known it remains known forever. This simple and natural definition includes all MDPs and captures classical non-trivial examples such as the Tiger POMDP (Kaelbling et al. 1998), making it one of the largest known classes of POMDPs for which the reachability value can be approximated.
tldr: This paper introduces posterior-deterministic POMDPs, a new class of POMDPs for which the maximal probability of reaching a given set of states can be approximated with arbitrary precision, overcoming the general intractability of reachability computation in POMDPs.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型的后验确定性POMDP，针对它可以任意精度地近似到达给定状态集的最大概率，从而克服了POMDP中可达性计算的一般难处理性。
summary_zh:
部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）是不确定性下序贯决策的基本模型。然而，POMDP 的许多验证和综合问题是不可判定的或难解的。最重要的是，Madani 等人 (2003) 的开创性成果表明，不存在一种算法，给定一个 POMDP 和一组目标状态，能够计算到达目标状态的最大概率，甚至无法将其近似到具有非平凡常数的程度。这与完全可观测马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）形成鲜明对比，在 MDP 中，可达性值可以在多项式时间内计算出来。

在这项工作中，我们引入了后验确定性 POMDP，这是一种新型的 POMDP。我们的主要技术贡献是证明，对于后验确定性 POMDP，到达给定状态集合的最大概率可以被近似到任意精度。

如果下一个状态可以由当前状态、采取的行动以及接收到的观测结果唯一确定，则称POMDP是后验确定性的。虽然在 POMDP 中实际状态通常是不确定的，但后验确定性性质告诉我们，一旦真实状态已知，它将永远保持已知。这个简单而自然的定义包括所有 MDP，并捕捉了经典的非平凡例子，例如 Tiger POMDP (Kaelbling et al. 1998)，使其成为已知可近似可达性值的最大POMDP类之一。

title: Agentic Uncertainty Reveals Agentic Overconfidence
summary: Can AI agents predict whether they will succeed at a task? We study agentic uncertainty by eliciting success probability estimates before, during, and after task execution. All results exhibit agentic overconfidence: some agents that succeed only 22% of the time predict 77% success. Counterintuitively, pre-execution assessment with strictly less information tends to yield better discrimination than standard post-execution review, though differences are not always significant. Adversarial prompting reframing assessment as bug-finding achieves the best calibration.
tldr: This paper examines the ability of AI agents to predict their own success, finding they exhibit overconfidence and that pre-execution assessments can sometimes be more accurate than post-execution ones. Adversarial prompting improves calibration.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了人工智能智能体预测自身任务成功的能力，发现它们表现出过度自信，并且执行前评估有时比执行后评估更准确。对抗性提示可以提高校准。
summary_zh: 人工智能体能否预测它们是否能成功完成一项任务？我们通过在任务执行前、中、后引出成功概率估算来研究智能体的主观不确定性。所有的结果都展现出智能体的主观过度自信：一些成功率仅为22%的智能体预测成功率为77%。与直觉相反，拥有严格更少信息的执行前评估往往比标准的执行后审查产生更好的区分度，尽管差异并不总是显著的。将评估重新定义为查找错误的对抗性提示实现了最佳的校准。

title: Optimal Derivative Feedback Control for an Active Magnetic Levitation System: An Experimental Study on Data-Driven Approaches
summary: This paper presents the design and implementation of data-driven optimal derivative feedback controllers for an active magnetic levitation system. A direct, model-free control design method based on the reinforcement learning framework is compared with an indirect optimal control design derived from a numerically identified mathematical model of the system. For the direct model-free approach, a policy iteration procedure is proposed, which adds an iteration layer called the epoch loop to gather multiple sets of process data, providing a more diverse dataset and helping reduce learning biases. This direct control design method is evaluated against a comparable optimal control solution designed from a plant model obtained through the combined Dynamic Mode Decomposition with Control (DMDc) and Prediction Error Minimization (PEM) system identification. Results show that while both controllers can stabilize and improve the performance of the magnetic levitation system when compared to controllers designed from a nominal model, the direct model-free approach consistently outperforms the indirect solution when multiple epochs are allowed. The iterative refinement of the optimal control law over the epoch loop provides the direct approach a clear advantage over the indirect method, which relies on a single set of system data to determine the identified model and control.
tldr: This paper compares a direct, model-free reinforcement learning approach with an indirect, model-based optimal control method for an active magnetic levitation system, finding the former, with iterative refinement, to outperform the latter.
tldr_zh: 本文比较了直接的、无模型的强化学习方法和间接的、基于模型的优化控制方法，用于主动磁悬浮系统， 发现前者，通过迭代改进，优于后者。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了用于主动磁悬浮系统的数据驱动型最优微分反馈控制器的设计与实现。一种基于强化学习框架的直接、无模型控制设计方法与通过数值辨识系统数学模型导出的间接最优控制设计方法进行了比较。对于直接无模型方法，本文提出了一种策略迭代程序，该程序增加了一个名为纪元循环的迭代层来收集多组过程数据，从而提供更具多样性的数据集并有助于减少学习偏差。这种直接控制设计方法与通过结合动态模态分解与控制（DMDc）和预测误差最小化（PEM）系统辨识方法获得的被控对象模型设计的可比最优控制解决方案进行了评估。结果表明，与基于标称模型设计的控制器相比，两种控制器都能稳定并改善磁悬浮系统的性能，但当允许多个纪元时，直接无模型方法始终优于间接解决方案。在训练循环上迭代改进最优控制律为直接方法提供了明显的优势，而间接方法则依赖于单组系统数据来确定辨识模型和控制。

title: "Meet My Sidekick!": Effects of Separate Identities and Control of a Single Robot in HRI
summary: The presentation of a robot's capability and identity directly influences a human collaborator's perception and implicit trust in the robot. Unlike humans, a physical robot can simultaneously present different identities and have them reside and control different parts of the robot. This paper presents a novel study that investigates how users perceive a robot where different robot control domains (head and gripper) are presented as independent robots. We conducted a mixed design study where participants experienced one of three presentations: a single robot, two agents with shared full control (co-embodiment), or two agents with split control across robot control domains (split-embodiment). Participants underwent three distinct tasks -- a mundane data entry task where the robot provides motivational support, an individual sorting task with isolated robot failures, and a collaborative arrangement task where the robot causes a failure that directly affects the human participant. Participants perceived the robot as residing in the different control domains and were able to associate robot failure with different identities. This work signals how future robots can leverage different embodiment configurations to obtain the benefit of multiple robots within a single body.
tldr: This paper investigates how humans perceive and interact with a single robot presenting itself as multiple agents with either shared or split control over different robot parts, finding that participants attribute failures to specific identities.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了人类如何感知和与一个呈现为多个代理的机器人互动，这些代理对机器人的不同部分具有共享或分割的控制权。研究发现，参与者将故障归因于特定的身份。
summary_zh: 机器人能力和身份的呈现方式直接影响人类合作者对机器人的感知和隐性信任。与人类不同，一个物理机器人可以同时呈现不同的身份，并使这些身份驻留在并控制机器人的不同部分。本文提出了一项新颖的研究，旨在调查用户如何感知一个机器人，其中不同的机器人控制域（头部和夹爪）被呈现为独立的机器人。我们进行了一项混合设计研究，参与者体验了三种呈现方式之一：单个机器人、具有共享完全控制权的两个代理（共体现）或在机器人控制域之间具有分割控制权的两个代理（分割体现）。参与者经历了三个不同的任务——一个日常的数据录入任务（机器人提供激励支持）、一个包含孤立机器人故障的个人分类任务，以及一个机器人故障直接影响人类参与者的协作整理任务。参与者认为机器人驻留在不同的控制域中，并且能够将机器人故障与不同的身份相关联。这项工作预示着未来的机器人如何利用不同的体现配置，从而在一个单一的身体内获得多个机器人的优势。

title: CA-YOLO: Cross Attention Empowered YOLO for Biomimetic Localization
summary: In modern complex environments, achieving accurate and efficient target localization is essential in numerous fields. However, existing systems often face limitations in both accuracy and the ability to recognize small targets. In this study, we propose a bionic stabilized localization system based on CA-YOLO, designed to enhance both target localization accuracy and small target recognition capabilities. Acting as the "brain" of the system, the target detection algorithm emulates the visual focusing mechanism of animals by integrating bionic modules into the YOLO backbone network. These modules include the introduction of a small target detection head and the development of a Characteristic Fusion Attention Mechanism (CFAM). Furthermore, drawing inspiration from the human Vestibulo-Ocular Reflex (VOR), a bionic pan-tilt tracking control strategy is developed, which incorporates central positioning, stability optimization, adaptive control coefficient adjustment, and an intelligent recapture function. The experimental results show that CA-YOLO outperforms the original model on standard datasets (COCO and VisDrone), with average accuracy metrics improved by 3.94%and 4.90%, respectively.Further time-sensitive target localization experiments validate the effectiveness and practicality of this bionic stabilized localization system.
tldr: The paper introduces CA-YOLO, a YOLO-based object detection system with cross-attention mechanisms and bio-inspired design for improved small target accuracy and stability, validated on standard datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了CA-YOLO，一个基于YOLO的目标检测系统，它结合了交叉注意机制和生物灵感设计，以提高小目标精度和稳定性，并在标准数据集上进行了验证。
summary_zh: 在现代复杂环境中，实现精确高效的目标定位在诸多领域至关重要。然而，现有系统常常在精度和识别小目标的能力方面面临局限性。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于CA-YOLO的仿生稳定定位系统，旨在增强目标定位精度和小目标识别能力。目标检测算法作为系统的“大脑”，通过将仿生模块集成到YOLO骨干网络中，模拟动物的视觉聚焦机制。这些模块包括引入一个小目标检测头和开发一种特征融合注意力机制（CFAM）。此外，从人体的视觉前庭反射(VOR)中汲取灵感，开发了一种仿生云台跟踪控制策略，该策略融合了中心定位、稳定性优化、自适应控制系数调整和智能重捕获功能。实验结果表明，CA-YOLO在标准数据集（COCO和VisDrone）上的表现优于原始模型，平均精度指标分别提高了3.94%和4.90%。进一步的时敏性目标定位实验验证了该仿生稳定定位系统的有效性和实用性。

title: Adaptive Image Zoom-in with Bounding Box Transformation for UAV Object Detection
summary: Detecting objects from UAV-captured images is challenging due to the small object size. In this work, a simple and efficient adaptive zoom-in framework is explored for object detection on UAV images. The main motivation is that the foreground objects are generally smaller and sparser than those in common scene images, which hinders the optimization of effective object detectors. We thus aim to zoom in adaptively on the objects to better capture object features for the detection task. To achieve the goal, two core designs are required: \textcolor{black}{i) How to conduct non-uniform zooming on each image efficiently? ii) How to enable object detection training and inference with the zoomed image space?} Correspondingly, a lightweight offset prediction scheme coupled with a novel box-based zooming objective is introduced to learn non-uniform zooming on the input image. Based on the learned zooming transformation, a corner-aligned bounding box transformation method is proposed. The method warps the ground-truth bounding boxes to the zoomed space to learn object detection, and warps the predicted bounding boxes back to the original space during inference. We conduct extensive experiments on three representative UAV object detection datasets, including VisDrone, UAVDT, and SeaDronesSee. The proposed ZoomDet is architecture-independent and can be applied to an arbitrary object detection architecture. Remarkably, on the SeaDronesSee dataset, ZoomDet offers more than 8.4 absolute gain of mAP with a Faster R-CNN model, with only about 3 ms additional latency. The code is available at https://github.com/twangnh/zoomdet_code.
tldr: This paper introduces ZoomDet, an adaptive image zoom-in framework for UAV object detection that learns non-uniform zooming via offset prediction and box-based objectives to improve the detection of small objects, demonstrating significant mAP gains with minimal latency overhead.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为ZoomDet的自适应图像放大框架，用于无人机目标检测。该框架通过偏移预测和基于框的目标来学习非均匀放大，以改进小目标的检测，并在最小的延迟开销下实现了显著的mAP增益。
summary_zh: 由于无人机捕获图像中小目标尺寸的挑战，检测无人机图像中的目标具有挑战性。本文探索了一种简单而有效的自适应放大框架，用于无人机图像上的目标检测。主要动机是前景目标通常比常见场景图像中的目标更小、更稀疏，这阻碍了有效目标检测器的优化。因此，我们旨在自适应地放大目标，以便更好地捕获目标特征以用于检测任务。为了实现该目标，需要两个核心设计：\textcolor{black}{i) 如何高效地对每幅图像进行非均匀缩放？ii) 如何在缩放后的图像空间中进行目标检测训练和推理？} 相应地，引入了一种轻量级的偏移预测方案，并结合了一种新颖的基于框的缩放目标，以学习输入图像上的非均匀缩放。基于学习到的缩放变换，提出了一种角点对齐的边界框变换方法。该方法将真实边界框扭曲到缩放空间以学习目标检测，并在推理期间将预测的边界框扭曲回原始空间。我们在三个具有代表性的无人机目标检测数据集（包括 VisDrone、UAVDT 和 SeaDronesSee）上进行了广泛的实验。所提出的 ZoomDet 与架构无关，可以应用于任意目标检测架构。值得注意的是，在 SeaDronesSee 数据集上，ZoomDet 使用 Faster R-CNN 模型提供了超过 8.4 个百分点的 mAP 绝对增益，并且只有约 3 毫秒的额外延迟。代码可在 https://github.com/twangnh/zoomdet_code 获取。

title: IM-Animation: An Implicit Motion Representation for Identity-decoupled Character Animation
summary: Recent progress in video diffusion models has markedly advanced character animation, which synthesizes motioned videos by animating a static identity image according to a driving video. Explicit methods represent motion using skeleton, DWPose or other explicit structured signals, but struggle to handle spatial mismatches and varying body scales. %proportions. Implicit methods, on the other hand, capture high-level implicit motion semantics directly from the driving video, but suffer from identity leakage and entanglement between motion and appearance. To address the above challenges, we propose a novel implicit motion representation that compresses per-frame motion into compact 1D motion tokens. This design relaxes strict spatial constraints inherent in 2D representations and effectively prevents identity information leakage from the motion video. Furthermore, we design a temporally consistent mask token-based retargeting module that enforces a temporal training bottleneck, mitigating interference from the source images' motion and improving retargeting consistency. Our methodology employs a three-stage training strategy to enhance the training efficiency and ensure high fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our implicit motion representation and the propose IM-Animation's generative capabilities are achieve superior or competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art methods.
tldr: This paper introduces IM-Animation, a novel implicit motion representation for character animation that addresses identity leakage and entanglement issues in existing methods by compressing motion into 1D tokens and using a temporal training bottleneck.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为IM-Animation的新颖的隐式运动表示方法，用于角色动画。该方法通过将运动压缩成一维token并使用时间训练瓶颈来解决现有方法中的身份泄露和纠缠问题。
summary_zh: 视频扩散模型领域的最新进展显著推动了角色动画的发展，该技术通过驱动视频来动画化静态身份图像，从而合成具有动作的视频。显式方法使用骨骼、DWPose或其他显式结构化信号来表示运动，但在处理空间不匹配和变化的身体比例方面存在困难。另一方面，隐式方法直接从驱动视频中捕获高层次的隐式运动语义，但存在身份泄露以及运动和外观之间纠缠的问题。为了解决上述挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的隐式运动表示方法，该方法将每帧运动压缩成紧凑的1D运动令牌。这种设计放宽了2D表示中固有的严格空间约束，并有效地防止了身份信息从运动视频中泄露。此外，我们设计了一个基于时间一致性掩码令牌的重定向模块，该模块强制执行时间训练瓶颈，从而减轻源图像运动的干扰并提高重定向一致性。我们的方法采用三阶段训练策略，以提高训练效率并确保高保真度。大量实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的隐式运动表示和提出的IM-Animation的生成能力实现了优越或具有竞争力的性能。

title: Thermal odometry and dense mapping using learned ddometry and Gaussian splatting
summary: Thermal infrared sensors, with wavelengths longer than smoke particles, can capture imagery independent of darkness, dust, and smoke. This robustness has made them increasingly valuable for motion estimation and environmental perception in robotics, particularly in adverse conditions. Existing thermal odometry and mapping approaches, however, are predominantly geometric and often fail across diverse datasets while lacking the ability to produce dense maps. Motivated by the efficiency and high-quality reconstruction ability of recent Gaussian Splatting (GS) techniques, we propose TOM-GS, a thermal odometry and mapping method that integrates learning-based odometry with GS-based dense mapping. TOM-GS is among the first GS-based SLAM systems tailored for thermal cameras, featuring dedicated thermal image enhancement and monocular depth integration. Extensive experiments on motion estimation and novel-view rendering demonstrate that TOM-GS outperforms existing learning-based methods, confirming the benefits of learning-based pipelines for robust thermal odometry and dense reconstruction.
tldr: The paper introduces TOM-GS, a novel thermal odometry and mapping method using learning-based odometry and Gaussian Splatting (GS) for robust dense reconstruction in adverse conditions, outperforming existing learning-based methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了TOM-GS，一种新颖的热成像里程计和地图构建方法，它使用基于学习的里程计和高斯溅射（GS）来进行鲁棒的密集重建，在恶劣条件下优于现有的基于学习的方法。
summary_zh: 红外热像仪的波长长于烟雾颗粒，因此能够独立于黑暗、灰尘和烟雾捕获图像。这种稳健性使其在机器人技术中的运动估计和环境感知方面，尤其是在恶劣条件下，变得越来越有价值。然而，现有的热力里程计和地图构建方法主要基于几何，并且通常在不同的数据集中失效，同时缺乏生成稠密地图的能力。受近期高斯溅射(GS)技术的高效性和高质量重建能力的启发，我们提出了一种热力里程计和地图构建方法TOM-GS，该方法集成了基于学习的里程计与基于GS的稠密地图构建。TOM-GS是首批专为热像仪定制的基于GS的SLAM系统之一，具有专门的热图像增强和单目深度融合功能。大量的运动估计和新视角渲染实验表明，TOM-GS优于现有的基于学习的方法，证实了基于学习的管道在实现稳健的热力里程计和稠密重建方面的优势。

title: Object-Oriented Transition Modeling with Inductive Logic Programming
summary: Building models of the world from observation, i.e., induction, is one of the major challenges in machine learning. In order to be useful, models need to maintain accuracy when used in novel situations, i.e., generalize. In addition, they should be easy to interpret and efficient to train. Prior work has investigated these concepts in the context of object-oriented representations inspired by human cognition. In this paper, we develop a novel learning algorithm that is substantially more powerful than these previous methods. Our thorough experiments, including ablation tests and comparison with neural baselines, demonstrate a significant improvement over the state-of-the-art.
tldr: This paper introduces a new inductive logic programming algorithm for object-oriented transition modeling, claiming significant performance improvements over existing methods and neural baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的基于归纳逻辑编程的面向对象转换建模算法，声称比现有方法和神经基线有显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 从观察中构建世界模型，即归纳，是机器学习领域的主要挑战之一。为了实用性，模型需要在新的情境中使用时保持准确性，即具备泛化能力。此外，它们应该易于解释且训练高效。先前的研究工作已经在受到人类认知启发的面向对象表示的背景下探讨了这些概念。在本文中，我们开发了一种新型学习算法，其能力远超以往的方法。我们全面的实验，包括消融测试和与神经基线的比较，证明了其相比现有技术的显著改进。

title: $\partial$CBDs: Differentiable Causal Block Diagrams
summary: Modern cyber-physical systems (CPS) integrate physics, computation, and learning, demanding modeling frameworks that are simultaneously composable, learnable, and verifiable. Yet existing approaches treat these goals in isolation: causal block diagrams (CBDs) support modular system interconnections but lack differentiability for learning; differentiable programming (DP) enables end-to-end gradient-based optimization but provides limited correctness guarantees; while contract-based verification frameworks remain largely disconnected from data-driven model refinement. To address these limitations, we introduce differentiable causal block diagrams ($\partial$CBDs), a unifying formalism that integrates these three perspectives. Our approach (i) retains the compositional structure and execution semantics of CBDs, (ii) incorporates assume--guarantee (A--G) contracts for modular correctness reasoning, and (iii) introduces residual-based contracts as differentiable, trajectory-level certificates compatible with automatic differentiation (AD), enabling gradient-based optimization and learning. Together, these elements enable a scalable, verifiable, and trainable modeling pipeline that preserves causality and modularity while supporting data-, physics-, and constraint-informed optimization for CPS.
tldr: This paper introduces differentiable causal block diagrams ($\partial$CBDs), a framework that combines composable system modeling, assume-guarantee contracts for verification, and differentiable programming for learning in cyber-physical systems, enabling scalable, verifiable, and trainable modeling pipelines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了可微因果框图 ($\partial$CBDs)，它结合了可组合系统建模、用于验证的假定-保证合同以及用于网络物理系统中学习的可微编程，从而实现了可扩展、可验证和可训练的建模流程。
summary_zh: 现代信息物理系统(CPS)整合了物理、计算和学习，需要一种兼具可组合性、可学习性和可验证性的建模框架。然而，现有方法将这些目标孤立对待：因果框图(CBD)支持模块化系统互连，但缺乏学习所需的微分性；可微分编程(DP)支持端到端基于梯度的优化，但提供的正确性保证有限；而基于契约的验证框架与数据驱动模型精化很大程度上脱节。为了解决这些局限性，我们引入了可微分因果框图($\partial$CBDs)，一种统一的形式体系，整合了这三个视角。我们的方法(i)保留了CBD的组合结构和执行语义，(ii)纳入了假定-保证(A--G)契约，用于模块化正确性推理，以及(iii)引入了基于残差的契约，作为可微分的轨迹级证书，与自动微分(AD)兼容，从而支持基于梯度的优化和学习。综上所述，这些要素实现了一种可扩展、可验证和可训练的建模流程，在保持因果性和模块化的同时，支持数据、物理和约束驱动的CPS优化。

title: Probing Neural TSP Representations for Prescriptive Decision Support
summary: The field of neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) trains neural policies to solve NP-hard problems such as the traveling salesperson problem (TSP). We ask whether, beyond producing good tours, a trained TSP solver learns internal representations that transfer to other optimization-relevant objectives, in the spirit of transfer learning from other domains. We train several attention-based TSP policies, collect their internal activations, and train probes on node/edge embeddings for two NP-hard prescriptive downstream tasks inspired by real-world logistics scenarios: node-removal sensitivity (identifying the most impactful node to remove) and edge-forbid sensitivity (identifying the most critical edge to retain). On a Euclidean TSP100-trained model, probes for both tasks are competitive with existing baselines. Ensembling probe signals with geometric features outperforms the strongest baselines: 65\% top-1 accuracy (vs. 58\% baseline) for the best-node-removal task, and 73\% top-1 accuracy (vs. 67\% baseline) for the worst-edge identification task. To our knowledge, we are the first to study neural TSP solvers as transferable encoders for prescriptive what-if decision-support objectives beyond tour construction. Finally, we show that transfer accuracy increases with solver quality across training and model scale, suggesting that training stronger NCO solvers also yields more useful encoders for downstream objectives. Our code is available at: github.com/ReubenNarad/tsp_prescriptive_probe
tldr: This paper explores the transferability of internal representations learned by neural TSP solvers to other NP-hard prescriptive tasks relevant to real-world logistics, demonstrating competitive performance and improvements over baselines when using probe signals ensembled with geometric features.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了神经TSP求解器学习到的内部表征向其他与现实物流相关的NP-hard处方任务的可转移性，证明了在使用探测信号与几何特征集成时，其性能具有竞争力并优于基线。
summary_zh: 神经组合优化（NCO）领域训练神经策略以解决诸如旅行商问题（TSP）之类的NP难问题。我们在此探讨，除了生成良好的巡回路线之外，训练好的TSP求解器是否能够学习内部表示，并将其迁移到其他与优化相关的目标，类似于来自其他领域的迁移学习。我们训练了几个基于注意力机制的TSP策略，收集它们的内部激活值，并基于节点/边嵌入训练探测器，以用于两个受现实世界物流场景启发的NP难的描述性下游任务：节点移除敏感性（识别移除后影响最大的节点）和边禁止敏感性（识别需要保留的最关键边）。在一个使用欧几里德TSP100训练的模型上，两个任务的探测器都与现有基线具有竞争力。将探测器信号与几何特征集成可以优于最强的基线：在最佳节点移除任务上，其top-1准确率为65%（基线为58%），而在最差边识别任务上，其top-1准确率为73%（基线为67%）。据我们所知，我们是第一个研究神经TSP求解器作为可迁移编码器的，用于除巡回路线构建之外的描述性假设情景决策支持目标。最后，我们表明，随着训练过程和模型规模的扩大，迁移准确率随着求解器质量的提高而提高，这表明训练更强大的NCO求解器也会为下游目标产生更有用的编码器。我们的代码可在github.com/ReubenNarad/tsp_prescriptive_probe上获取。

title: Online Learning for Uninformed Markov Games: Empirical Nash-Value Regret and Non-Stationarity Adaptation
summary:
We study online learning in two-player uninformed Markov games, where the opponent's actions and policies are unobserved. In this setting, Tian et al. (2021) show that achieving no-external-regret is impossible without incurring an exponential dependence on the episode length $H$. They then turn to the weaker notion of Nash-value regret and propose a V-learning algorithm with regret $O(K^{2/3})$ after $K$ episodes. However, their algorithm and guarantee do not adapt to the difficulty of the problem: even in the case where the opponent follows a fixed policy and thus $O(\sqrt{K})$ external regret is well-known to be achievable, their result is still the worse rate $O(K^{2/3})$ on a weaker metric.
  In this work, we fully address both limitations. First, we introduce empirical Nash-value regret, a new regret notion that is strictly stronger than Nash-value regret and naturally reduces to external regret when the opponent follows a fixed policy. Moreover, under this new metric, we propose a parameter-free algorithm that achieves an $O(\min \{\sqrt{K} + (CK)^{1/3},\sqrt{LK}\})$ regret bound, where $C$ quantifies the variance of the opponent's policies and $L$ denotes the number of policy switches (both at most $O(K)$). Therefore, our results not only recover the two extremes -- $O(\sqrt{K})$ external regret when the opponent is fixed and $O(K^{2/3})$ Nash-value regret in the worst case -- but also smoothly interpolate between these extremes by automatically adapting to the opponent's non-stationarity. We achieve so by first providing a new analysis of the epoch-based V-learning algorithm by Mao et al. (2022), establishing an $O(ηC + \sqrt{K/η})$ regret bound, where $η$ is the epoch incremental factor. Next, we show how to adaptively restart this algorithm with an appropriate $η$ in response to the potential non-stationarity of the opponent, eventually achieving our final results.
tldr: This paper introduces empirical Nash-value regret, a new regret notion for online learning in uninformed Markov games, and proposes a parameter-free algorithm that adapts to the non-stationarity of the opponent's policy, achieving improved regret bounds.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的经验纳什值后悔概念，用于非信息马尔可夫博弈中的在线学习，并提出了一种无参数算法，该算法可以适应对手策略的非平稳性，从而实现改进的后悔界限。
summary_zh:
我们研究双人无信息马尔可夫博弈中的在线学习，其中对手的行动和策略是未观察到的。在这种背景下，Tian et al. (2021) 表明，在不产生对幕长 $H$ 的指数依赖的情况下，实现无外部遗憾是不可能的。然后，他们转向较弱的纳什值遗憾概念，并提出了一个 V-学习算法，在 $K$ 幕后获得 $O(K^{2/3})$ 的遗憾。然而，他们的算法和保证无法适应问题的难度：即使在对手遵循固定策略，因此众所周知可以实现 $O(\sqrt{K})$ 的外部遗憾的情况下，他们的结果仍然是在较弱的指标上获得更差的速率 $O(K^{2/3})$。

在这项工作中，我们全面地解决了这两个局限性。首先，我们引入了经验纳什值遗憾，这是一种新的遗憾概念，它严格强于纳什值遗憾，并且当对手遵循固定策略时，自然地简化为外部遗憾。此外，在这个新指标下，我们提出了一个无参数算法，该算法实现了 $O(\min \{\sqrt{K} + (CK)^{1/3},\sqrt{LK}\})$ 的遗憾界限，其中 $C$ 量化了对手策略的方差，$L$ 表示策略切换的次数（均至多为 $O(K)$）。因此，我们的结果不仅恢复了两个极端情况——对手固定时的 $O(\sqrt{K})$ 外部遗憾，以及最坏情况下的 $O(K^{2/3})$ 纳什值遗憾——而且还通过自动适应对手的非平稳性，在这两个极端之间平滑插值。我们首先对 Mao et al. (2022) 基于 epoch 的 V-学习算法进行了新的分析，建立了 $O(ηC + \sqrt{K/η})$ 的遗憾界限，其中 $η$ 是 epoch 增量因子。接下来，我们展示了如何自适应地重启该算法，并使用适当的 $η$ 来响应对手潜在的非平稳性，最终实现我们的最终结果。

title: Haptically Experienced Animacy Facilitates Emotion Regulation: A Theory-Driven Investigation
summary: Emotion regulation (ER) is essential to mental well-being but often difficult to access, especially in high-intensity moments or for individuals with clinical vulnerabilities. While existing technology-based ER tools offer value, they typically rely on self-reflection (e.g., emotion tracking, journaling) or co-regulation through verbal modalities (reminders, text-based conversational tools), which may not be accessible or effective when most needed. The biological role of the touch modality makes it an intriguing alternate pathway, but empirical evidence is limited and under-theorized. Building on our prior theoretical framework describing how a comforting haptic co-regulating adjunct (CHORA) can support ER, we developed a zoomorphic robot CHORA with looped biomimetic breathing and heartbeat behaviors. We evaluated its effects in a mixed-methods in-lab study (N=30), providing physiological, self-report, custom questionnaire, and retrospective interview data. Our findings demonstrate the regulatory effects of haptically experienced animacy, corroborate prior work, and validate CHORA's {theoretically grounded} potential to facilitate four ER strategies.
tldr: This paper introduces a zoomorphic robot (CHORA) designed to facilitate emotion regulation (ER) through haptic interaction, demonstrating its effectiveness in an in-lab study. The research explores an alternative, touch-based approach to ER, potentially useful when traditional methods fail.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种拟动物机器人 (CHORA)，旨在通过触觉互动促进情绪调节 (ER)，并在实验室研究中证明了其有效性。 这项研究探索了一种替代的、基于触摸的 ER 方法，可能在传统方法失效时有用。
summary_zh: 情绪调节对于心理健康至关重要，但往往难以实现，尤其是在高强度时刻或对于具有临床脆弱性的个体。虽然现有的技术驱动的的情绪调节工具具有价值，但它们通常依赖于自我反思（例如，情绪追踪、日记）或通过言语方式进行协同调节（提醒、基于文本的对话工具），这些方式在最需要的时候可能无法访问或无效。触觉方式的生物学作用使其成为一种引人入胜的替代途径，但实证证据有限且理论基础不足。基于我们先前描述舒适触觉协同调节辅助装置（CHORA）如何支持情绪调节的理论框架，我们开发了一种具有循环仿生呼吸和心跳行为的拟动物机器人CHORA。我们在一项混合方法实验室研究（N=30）中评估了其效果，提供了生理、自我报告、定制问卷和回顾性访谈数据。我们的研究结果表明了触觉体验的生物活性的调节效果，证实了先前的工作，并验证了CHORA在促进四种情绪调节策略方面的{理论基础扎实的}潜力。

title: A compliant ankle-actuated compass walker with triggering timing control
summary: Passive dynamic walkers are widely adopted as a mathematical model to represent biped walking. The stable locomotion of these models is limited to tilted surfaces, requiring gravitational energy. Various techniques, such as actuation through the ankle and hip joints, have been proposed to extend the applicability of these models to level ground and rough terrain with improved locomotion efficiency. However, most of these techniques rely on impulsive energy injection schemes and torsional springs, which are quite challenging to implement in a physical platform. Here, a new model is proposed, named triggering controlled ankle actuated compass gait (TC-AACG), which allows non-instantaneous compliant ankle pushoff. The proposed technique can be implemented in physical platforms via series elastic actuators (SEAs). Our systematic examination shows that the proposed approach extends the locomotion capabilities of a biped model compared to impulsive ankle pushoff approach. We provide extensive simulation analysis investigating the locomotion speed, mechanical cost of transport, and basin of attraction of the proposed model.
tldr: This paper introduces a new compliant ankle-actuated compass walker model (TC-AACG) with non-instantaneous pushoff, suitable for physical implementation using series elastic actuators, and demonstrates improved locomotion compared to impulsive approaches. They present simulations of speed, cost of transport, and basin of attraction.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型的柔顺踝关节驱动的指南针式步行者模型（TC-AACG），该模型具有非瞬时推力，适用于使用串联弹性致动器进行物理实现，并证明了与脉冲方法相比，步态有所改善。 他们展示了速度、运输成本和吸引盆的模拟。
summary_zh: 被动动态步行者被广泛用作代表双足步行的数学模型。这些模型的稳定运动受限于倾斜表面，需要重力势能。已经提出了各种技术，例如通过踝关节和髋关节的驱动，以提高运动效率并扩展这些模型在水平地面和崎岖地形上的适用性。然而，这些技术大多依赖于脉冲式能量注入方案和扭转弹簧，这在物理平台上实施极具挑战性。本文提出了一种新的模型，名为触发控制踝关节驱动指南针步态（TC-AACG），该模型允许非瞬时的柔顺踝关节蹬离。所提出的技术可以通过串联弹性驱动器（SEAs）在物理平台上实现。我们的系统性检验表明，与脉冲式踝关节蹬离方法相比，所提出的方法扩展了双足模型的运动能力。我们提供了广泛的模拟分析，研究了所提出模型的运动速度、机械运输成本和吸引盆。

title: Automated rock joint trace mapping using a supervised learning model trained on synthetic data generated by parametric modelling
summary: This paper presents a geology-driven machine learning method for automated rock joint trace mapping from images. The approach combines geological modelling, synthetic data generation, and supervised image segmentation to address limited real data and class imbalance. First, discrete fracture network models are used to generate synthetic jointed rock images at field-relevant scales via parametric modelling, preserving joint persistence, connectivity, and node-type distributions. Second, segmentation models are trained using mixed training and pretraining followed by fine-tuning on real images. The method is tested in box and slope domains using several real datasets. The results show that synthetic data can support supervised joint trace detection when real data are scarce. Mixed training performs well when real labels are consistent (e.g. box-domain), while fine-tuning is more robust when labels are noisy (e.g. slope-domain where labels can be biased, incomplete, and inconsistent). Fully zero-shot prediction from synthetic model remains limited, but useful generalisation is achieved by fine-tuning with a small number of real data. Qualitative analysis shows clearer and more geologically meaningful joint traces than indicated by quantitative metrics alone. The proposed method supports reliable joint mapping and provides a basis for further work on domain adaptation and evaluation.
tldr: The paper presents a supervised learning method for automated rock joint trace mapping using synthetic data generated from geological models, which addresses the issue of limited real-world data and class imbalance.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于监督学习的岩石节理迹线自动绘制方法，该方法使用从地质模型生成的合成数据，解决了真实世界数据有限和类不平衡的问题。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种地质驱动的机器学习方法，用于从图像中自动进行岩石节理迹线mapping。该方法结合了地质建模、合成数据生成和监督图像分割，以解决真实数据不足和类别不平衡的问题。首先，利用离散裂缝网络模型，通过参数化建模在与现场相关的尺度上生成合成的节理岩石图像，从而保留了节理的持续性、连通性和节点类型分布。其次，使用混合训练和预训练，然后对真实图像进行微调，来训练分割模型。该方法在箱型和斜坡区域使用多个真实数据集进行了测试。结果表明，当真实数据稀缺时，合成数据可以支持监督节理迹线检测。混合训练在真实标签一致时表现良好（例如，箱型区域），而当标签嘈杂时，微调更具鲁棒性（例如，标签可能有偏差、不完整和不一致的斜坡区域）。来自合成模型的完全零样本预测仍然有限，但通过少量真实数据进行微调可以实现有用的泛化。定性分析表明，与仅用定量指标相比，节理迹线更清晰且在地质上更有意义。所提出的方法支持可靠的节理mapping，并为领域自适应和评估方面的进一步工作提供了基础。

title: BadSNN: Backdoor Attacks on Spiking Neural Networks via Adversarial Spiking Neuron
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) are energy-efficient counterparts of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) with high biological plausibility, as information is transmitted through temporal spiking patterns. The core element of an SNN is the spiking neuron, which converts input data into spikes following the Leaky Integrate-and-Fire (LIF) neuron model. This model includes several important hyperparameters, such as the membrane potential threshold and membrane time constant. Both the DNNs and SNNs have proven to be exploitable by backdoor attacks, where an adversary can poison the training dataset with malicious triggers and force the model to behave in an attacker-defined manner. Yet, how an adversary can exploit the unique characteristics of SNNs for backdoor attacks remains underexplored. In this paper, we propose \textit{BadSNN}, a novel backdoor attack on spiking neural networks that exploits hyperparameter variations of spiking neurons to inject backdoor behavior into the model. We further propose a trigger optimization process to achieve better attack performance while making trigger patterns less perceptible. \textit{BadSNN} demonstrates superior attack performance on various datasets and architectures, as well as compared with state-of-the-art data poisoning-based backdoor attacks and robustness against common backdoor mitigation techniques. Codes can be found at https://github.com/SiSL-URI/BadSNN.
tldr: The paper introduces BadSNN, a novel backdoor attack on Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) that exploits hyperparameter variations of spiking neurons, demonstrating superior attack performance and robustness compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了BadSNN，一种针对脉冲神经网络（SNN）的新型后门攻击，它利用脉冲神经元的超参数变化，与现有方法相比，展示了卓越的攻击性能和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 脉冲神经网络（SNNs）是深度神经网络（DNNs）在能量效率上的对应模型，具有更高的生物合理性，因为信息是通过时间脉冲模式传输的。SNN 的核心元素是脉冲神经元，它遵循漏电积分发放（LIF）神经元模型将输入数据转换为脉冲。该模型包括几个重要的超参数，例如膜电位阈值和膜时间常数。深度神经网络和脉冲神经网络均已被证明容易受到后门攻击的利用，其中攻击者可以通过恶意触发器污染训练数据集，并迫使模型以攻击者定义的方式运行。然而，攻击者如何利用脉冲神经网络的独特特性进行后门攻击仍未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了 \textit{BadSNN}，一种针对脉冲神经网络的新型后门攻击，它利用脉冲神经元的超参数变化将后门行为注入模型。我们进一步提出了一种触发器优化过程，以实现更好的攻击性能，同时使触发模式更不易察觉。\textit{BadSNN} 在各种数据集和架构上表现出优越的攻击性能，并且与最先进的基于数据污染的后门攻击相比具有更强的鲁棒性，能抵御常见的后门缓解技术。代码可在 https://github.com/SiSL-URI/BadSNN 找到。

title: Human Identification at a Distance: Challenges, Methods and Results on the Competition HID 2025
summary: Human identification at a distance (HID) is challenging because traditional biometric modalities such as face and fingerprints are often difficult to acquire in real-world scenarios. Gait recognition provides a practical alternative, as it can be captured reliably at a distance. To promote progress in gait recognition and provide a fair evaluation platform, the International Competition on Human Identification at a Distance (HID) has been organized annually since 2020. Since 2023, the competition has adopted the challenging SUSTech-Competition dataset, which features substantial variations in clothing, carried objects, and view angles. No dedicated training data are provided, requiring participants to train their models using external datasets. Each year, the competition applies a different random seed to generate distinct evaluation splits, which reduces the risk of overfitting and supports a fair assessment of cross-domain generalization. While HID 2023 and HID 2024 already used this dataset, HID 2025 explicitly examined whether algorithmic advances could surpass the accuracy limits observed previously. Despite the heightened difficulty, participants achieved further improvements, and the best-performing method reached 94.2% accuracy, setting a new benchmark on this dataset. We also analyze key technical trends and outline potential directions for future research in gait recognition.
tldr: This paper summarizes the HID 2025 competition on human identification at a distance using gait recognition, highlighting improvements achieved on a challenging dataset with clothing, object, and viewpoint variations, achieving 94.2% accuracy, and analyzing technical trends for future research.
tldr_zh: 本文总结了HID 2025人体远距离识别竞赛，该竞赛使用步态识别技术，强调了在具有服装、物体和视角变化等挑战性数据集上取得的改进，达到了94.2%的准确率，并分析了步态识别的未来研究技术趋势。
summary_zh: 远距离人体识别（HID）极具挑战性，因为传统的生物特征模态，如面部和指纹，在现实场景中通常难以获取。步态识别提供了一种实用的替代方案，因为它可以在远处可靠地捕获。为了促进步态识别的进展并提供一个公平的评估平台，自2020年以来，每年都会举办远距离人体识别（HID）国际竞赛。自2023年起，该竞赛采用了具有挑战性的SUSTech-Competition数据集，该数据集具有服装、携带物品和视角角度的显著变化。不提供专门的训练数据，要求参赛者使用外部数据集训练他们的模型。每年，竞赛都应用不同的随机种子来生成不同的评估划分，从而降低了过度拟合的风险，并支持对跨域泛化能力的公平评估。虽然HID 2023和HID 2024已经使用了该数据集，但HID 2025明确考察了算法的进步是否可以超越之前观察到的准确率极限。尽管难度增加，参赛者仍取得了进一步的改进，表现最佳的方法达到了94.2%的准确率，为该数据集设定了新的基准。我们还分析了关键的技术趋势，并概述了步态识别未来研究的潜在方向。

title: Perspective-aware fusion of incomplete depth maps and surface normals for accurate 3D reconstruction
summary: We address the problem of reconstructing 3D surfaces from depth and surface normal maps acquired by a sensor system based on a single perspective camera. Depth and normal maps can be obtained through techniques such as structured-light scanning and photometric stereo, respectively. We propose a perspective-aware log-depth fusion approach that extends existing orthographic gradient-based depth-normals fusion methods by explicitly accounting for perspective projection, leading to metrically accurate 3D reconstructions. Additionally, the method handles missing depth measurements by leveraging available surface normal information to inpaint gaps. Experiments on the DiLiGenT-MV data set demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach and highlight the importance of perspective-aware depth-normals fusion.
tldr: This paper introduces a perspective-aware log-depth fusion method for 3D reconstruction from incomplete depth and normal maps, improving accuracy by accounting for perspective projection and using normals to inpaint missing depth data.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种透视感知的对数深度融合方法，用于从不完整的深度图和法线图重建3D模型。该方法通过考虑透视投影并利用法线信息填充缺失的深度数据，从而提高了重建精度。
summary_zh: 我们研究了从基于单透视相机的传感器系统获取的深度图和表面法线图重建三维表面的问题。深度图和法线图分别可以通过结构光扫描和光度立体等技术获得。我们提出了一种透视感知对数深度融合方法，该方法通过显式地考虑透视投影来扩展现有的基于正交梯度深度-法线融合方法，从而实现具有度量精度的三维重建。此外，该方法利用可用的表面法线信息来插补空缺，从而处理缺失的深度测量值。在DiLiGenT-MV数据集上的实验证明了我们方法的有效性，并突出了透视感知深度-法线融合的重要性。

title: Compact Conformal Subgraphs
summary: Conformal prediction provides rigorous, distribution-free uncertainty guarantees, but often yields prohibitively large prediction sets in structured domains such as routing, planning, or sequential recommendation. We introduce "graph-based conformal compression", a framework for constructing compact subgraphs that preserve statistical validity while reducing structural complexity. We formulate compression as selecting a smallest subgraph capturing a prescribed fraction of the probability mass, and reduce to a weighted version of densest $k$-subgraphs in hypergraphs, in the regime where the subgraph has a large fraction of edges. We design efficient approximation algorithms that achieve constant factor coverage and size trade-offs. Crucially, we prove that our relaxation satisfies a monotonicity property, derived from a connection to parametric minimum cuts, which guarantees the nestedness required for valid conformal guarantees. Our results on the one hand bridge efficient conformal prediction with combinatorial graph compression via monotonicity, to provide rigorous guarantees on both statistical validity, and compression or size. On the other hand, they also highlight an algorithmic regime, distinct from classical densest-$k$-subgraph hardness settings, where the problem can be approximated efficiently. We finally validate our algorithmic approach via simulations for trip planning and navigation, and compare to natural baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces a graph-based conformal compression framework that constructs compact subgraphs for structured prediction domains like routing and planning, while preserving statistical validity and reducing complexity, using an efficient approximation algorithm related to densest k-subgraphs.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于图的共形压缩框架，该框架构建紧凑的子图用于结构化预测领域，例如路由和规划，同时保留统计有效性并降低复杂度，使用与最密集 k-子图相关的有效近似算法。
summary_zh: 共形预测提供了严格的、与分布无关的不确定性保证，但在路由、规划或序列推荐等结构化领域中，通常会产生大得令人望而却步的预测集。我们引入了“基于图的共形压缩”，这是一个构建紧凑子图的框架，该框架在降低结构复杂性的同时，保持统计有效性。我们将压缩形式化为选择一个捕获规定概率质量的最小子图，并将其简化为超图中加权最稠密$k$子图的一个版本，在这种情况下，子图具有很大一部分边。我们设计了高效的近似算法，实现了常数因子覆盖率和大小之间的权衡。至关重要的是，我们证明了我们的松弛满足单调性，该性质源于与参数最小割的联系，这保证了有效共形保证所需的嵌套性。一方面，我们的结果通过单调性将高效的共形预测与组合图压缩联系起来，从而为统计有效性和压缩或大小提供严格的保证。另一方面，这些结果还突出了一个算法领域，它不同于经典的最稠密-$k$-子图的困难性设置，在这种设置下，该问题可以被有效地近似。最后，我们通过旅行计划和导航的模拟验证了我们的算法方法，并与自然基线进行了比较。
